examples: "Something blew out the light," he said a little unsteadily.
She pulled herself unsteadily from the bed to the dresser.
Unsteadily he mounted the podium, adjusted the microphone, coughed, and went completely blank.
She was limping, she explained, because of liposuction, moving tenderly and somewhat unsteadily on stilettos.
It sends a message to the world that it's back in business - albeit rather slowly and somewhat unsteadily.
